reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku but response returns generic Akita Wikidata entries (museums, toll booth, shrines, archaeology) with no sakura tagging or seasonal info. Single prefecture only, ignoring Tohoku-wide intent.
missing_data: Sakura-specific tags/season metadata; coverage of other Tohoku prefectures (Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Yamagata, Fukushima); known hanami spots like Hirosaki Park or Kakunodate.
improvement_hint: Add a 'sakura' or seasonal-keyword filter to get_spots and support multi-prefecture region queries (Tohoku).

reasoning: Query asks for Niigata sake breweries but get_local_specialty returns MAFF GI food items (chamame, snow carrots, lotus root) and METI crafts — no sake breweries. Tool choice/data scope mismatch; sake is famously a Niigata specialty but absent.
missing_data: Sake brewery list (e.g., Hakkaisan, Kubota/Asahi Shuzo, Hakkaisan, Kakurei). A 'sake' subcategory or producer registry.
improvement_hint: Add NTA/Sake brewery directory or expand get_local_specialty to include alcohol producers under a 'beverage' category.

reasoning: Query asks for Hakuba ski resorts with onsen. Response returns 6 Hakuba spots: 2 museums and 4 municipal admin pages (tourism office). No ski resorts (Happo-One, Goryu, Iwatake) or onsen listed despite being core Hakuba assets.
missing_data: Hakuba ski resorts (Happo-One, Hakuba47, Goryu, Iwatake, Tsugaike) and onsen properties (Hakuba Happo Onsen).
improvement_hint: Improve municipal scrape coverage for Hakuba and add a 'ski_resort' / 'onsen' tag filter to get_spots.

reasoning: Query is about Kansai autumn foliage; response returns generic Kyoto spots (museums, tombs, Sennyu-ji) without koyo tagging. Sennyu-ji is legitimately a momiji temple but no seasonal metadata exposed; missing famous spots like Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do, Arashiyama.
missing_data: Autumn foliage tags/season; canonical momiji temples (Tofuku-ji, Eikando, Kiyomizu); other Kansai prefectures (Osaka, Hyogo, Nara, Wakayama, Shiga).
improvement_hint: Add seasonal-feature tags (sakura/koyo) and support Kansai region grouping in get_spots.

reasoning: Arabic query for Kansai sakura spots; response gives Nara general spots (Nara Park is fine for sakura, Kasugayama). Lacks the iconic Yoshino-yama and Mt. Yoshino sakura which are Nara's premier hanami site, plus broader Kansai coverage.
missing_data: Mt. Yoshino (Yoshinoyama) — Japan's most famous cherry site; Mt. Tsubosakayama; sakura-specific tagging.
improvement_hint: Boost Yoshinoyama prominence and add a sakura/hanami tag to enable seasonal filtering.

reasoning: User asks for stargazing spots on Okinawa remote islands. Response returns Okinawa main-island heritage spots (castles, aquarium, theme parks). Iriomote, Hateruma (Japan's southernmost stargazing island) and Ishigaki dark-sky park missing.
missing_data: Ishigaki Iriomote National Park dark-sky designation, Hateruma Island, Kohama, Taketomi remote-island stargazing spots.
improvement_hint: Add 'remote_island' / 'dark_sky' attributes and ensure Yaeyama/Miyako islands are surfaced for Okinawa queries.

reasoning: Thai query for rural Hokkaido onsen ryokan. Response returns urban Sapporo/Kushiro business hotels (ANA Holiday Inn, ANA Crowne Plaza) plus Niseko apartments — opposite of 'rural onsen'. No ryokan/onsen filtering applied.
missing_data: Lodging_type filter for onsen_ryokan; rural areas like Noboribetsu, Jozankei, Sounkyo, Akan, Lake Toya.
improvement_hint: Honor lodging_type and rural keywords; add onsen_area metadata to hotels.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Setouchi islands worth visiting. Response includes Naoshima art (Lee Ufan, Chichu) and Shodoshima (Angel Road) which match. Mixed with Takamatsu castle/Ritsurin (mainland). Coverage Kagawa-only; missing Teshima, Inujima, Ogijima, Ehime/Hiroshima islands.
missing_data: Teshima, Inujima, Megijima/Ogijima art islands; Setouchi region grouping across prefectures.
improvement_hint: Add 'island' tag and a Setouchi region preset spanning Kagawa/Okayama/Hiroshima/Ehime.

reasoning: Tokushima indigo dyeing query: response surfaces Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (correct, indigo-dyed cotton) and Awa Washi (mentions indigo-dyed paper). Otani Ware is off-topic but a Tokushima craft. No workshop addresses or hands-on info — user wants 'workshops' but only METI designation entries returned.
missing_data: Workshop/experience venues (e.g., Aizumi Historical Museum 藍の館, Buaisou); contact details, hours.
improvement_hint: Link craft items to known experience venues or add a 'workshop' attribute via municipal scrape data.

reasoning: German query for Koyasan shukubo (Buddhist temple lodgings). Response returns Wakayama hotels (Tanabe, Kushimoto, Wakayama City) and a 'Business Hotel Kushimoto' tagged onsen_ryokan. No Koyasan temples like Eko-in or Fukuchi-in. Prefecture filter doesn't constrain to Koya; lodging_type=temple absent.
missing_data: Koyasan shukubo temples (Eko-in, Fukuchi-in, Henjoson-in, Sekisho-in); a temple/shukubo lodging_type.
improvement_hint: Add a shukubo/temple-lodging type and accept municipality='高野町' filter.

reasoning: search_area for 武家屋敷 returns 87 matches including Buke Yashiki (Shimane), Kakunodate-style Uchiyama residence (Fukui), Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Nagamachi (Kanazawa). Solid samurai-district coverage outside Kyoto. Some noisy general regional intros (Saga, Yamagata) hurt expression. Misses Kakunodate explicitly though.
missing_data: Kakunodate samurai district (Akita); Hagi (Yamaguchi).
improvement_hint: Filter out generic regional 'about' pages from search_area; boost named samurai-district results.

reasoning: Indonesian query for Akita summer festivals. Returned 3 items — Kakunodate Festival (autumn), Tsuchizaki Shinmei (summer, correct), Dainichido Bugaku (January, not summer). Famous Akita summer festivals (Kanto Matsuri, Omagari Hanabi, Nebuta-style events) absent. National_heritage list adds non-Akita items.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Matsuri, Omagari Fireworks; explicit season/date metadata.
wrong_data: Dainichido Bugaku is winter (Jan 2), not summer; classification doesn't match query season.
improvement_hint: Add date/season filter to get_festivals and ensure major prefectural festivals are indexed.

reasoning: Korean query for small fishing villages in Sanin. Response returns Shimane heritage (Gassan-Toda Castle, Adachi Museum, Iwami Ginzan, Izumo Taisha, Tsuwano Castle) — none are fishing villages. Tomonoura/Mihonoseki/Hamada port towns missing.
missing_data: Mihonoseki, Hamada, Yunotsu port villages; coastal Tottori (Sakaiminato).
improvement_hint: Tag spots with 'port_town'/'fishing_village' attribute and group Sanin (Shimane+Tottori+Yamaguchi north).

reasoning: Gifu washi query: response includes Mino Ware, Hidehira-nuri, Hida Shunkei — Mino Washi (Honminoshi) is the iconic Gifu washi but truncated/may appear later. No experience venues or workshop info; user asked 'where to experience' which needs venue addresses.
missing_data: Honminoshi/Mino washi paper-making experience venues (Mino Washi Museum, Mino city); workshop hours.
improvement_hint: Link MET designations to municipal experience facilities; add 'workshop_available' attribute.

reasoning: Spanish query for Noto Peninsula fishing villages. Response surfaces Kanazawa-centric assets (Kenrokuen, 21st Century Museum, Oyama Shrine, Kokuritsu Kogeikan) and Nanao Castle plus Keta Shrine. Wajima, Suzu, Ama-no-Iwato fishing villages absent.
missing_data: Wajima asaichi morning market, Sosogi/Senmaida (Wajima), Suzu, Noto-cho fishing settlements.
improvement_hint: Add Noto-region municipal coverage and 'fishing_village' / coastal-feature tagging.

reasoning: Search for 砂丘 (sand dunes). Top results dominated by Tottori promo pages (which user explicitly excluded). Other results include unrelated Saga/Yamagata/Kagawa intros. Tottori sakyu rakkyo GI item appears but no Nakatajima, Sarugamori, Niigata Saigata dunes.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Shizuoka), Sarugamori (Aomori), Niigata coastal dunes.
improvement_hint: Improve search_area negation handling and surface specific named dunes outside Tottori; reduce navigational/region-intro noise.

reasoning: Chinese query for Sanin traditional crafts; tool returned Shimane-only but with 4 strong METI-designated crafts (Iwami-yaki, Sekishu washi, Unshu abacus, Izumo stone lanterns) with high-quality Chinese translations and production areas. Solid for an agent to compose answer.
missing_data: Tottori crafts (Inshu washi, Yumihama-gasuri) — Sanin spans Shimane+Tottori.
improvement_hint: Allow region='Sanin' in get_local_specialty to span Shimane+Tottori+Yamaguchi.

reasoning: Lavender beyond Furano: response returns Sapporo museums, art park, Hakodate museum, Shikisai-no-oka (Biei — actually relevant flower fields), Kushiro wetland. Furano/Biei lavender farms (Farm Tomita) not surfaced explicitly except Shikisai-no-oka.
missing_data: Farm Tomita, Choei lavender field (Nakafurano), Hokuryu sunflower; lavender-specific tagging.
improvement_hint: Add 'flower_field' / botanical attribute and boost famous farm entities.

reasoning: Tagalog query for traditional Kyushu coffee/old towns. Tool call uses Oita only and returns Beppu Tower, Rakutenchi, African Safari, Funai Castle — none are coffee or old-town focused. Query intent ('kape' = coffee) seems mistranslated (likely meant 'old towns'); either way response doesn't address it.
missing_data: Old-town districts (Hita Mameda-machi, Kitsuki samurai town, Yufuin); explicit theme tagging.
improvement_hint: Disambiguate Filipino/multilingual queries; add 'historic_district' tag and accept multi-prefecture Kyushu region.

reasoning: Japanese query for Hokuriku old-house (kominka) lodgings. Response returns student housing, AB Hotel, ANA Crowne Plaza, generic guest houses — none flagged as kominka. Many entries lack name/website/phone (low usability). No traditional-stay metadata.
missing_data: Kominka stays (e.g., Wajima/Noto/Shirakawa-go-ish), Toyama/Fukui inclusion; lodging_type='kominka' or 'machiya'.

reasoning: Kii Peninsula mountain shrines: get_japan_heritage returns Wakayama heritage stories. 'Living with Whales' and 'Yuasa Soy Sauce' shown — relevant to Kii but not directly mountain-shrine. Kumano Sanzan (Hongu, Hayatama, Nachi) and Koyasan likely in remaining items but truncated. Body text very long.

improvement_hint: Add a theme='mountain_shrine' filter and trim heritage body text in default view; surface Kumano and Koyasan first for Wakayama.

reasoning: Sea of Japan summer fireworks query. get_festivals returned count:0 for Niigata and only national_heritage fallback (Akita Bugaku, Hayachine Kagura, Kawagoe, etc.) — none are Niigata fireworks. Nagaoka Fireworks (one of Japan's three big hanabi) absent.
missing_data: Nagaoka Matsuri Fireworks, Kashiwazaki, Niigata Matsuri fireworks; fireworks taxonomy in get_festivals.
wrong_data: National_heritage fallback items are misleading — none are Niigata or hanabi.
improvement_hint: Index hanabi/firework events as a festival subcategory; suppress national_heritage fallback when prefecture has no actual matches.

reasoning: Oita bamboo crafts: returns Beppu Bamboo Crafts (Beppu Takezaiku) — exactly the iconic Oita craft — with detailed English description, materials, designation date, production area. Hakata Ori included due to multi-prefecture spillover. Strong match.
improvement_hint: Optionally rank prefecture-primary crafts above multi-prefecture spillovers.

reasoning: Cycling routes in rural Shikoku: response returns Ehime castles, parks, Shimonada Station. Shimanami Kaido (Imabari↔Onomichi) — Japan's most famous cycling route — implied via Imabari Castle but not surfaced as cycling route. No route metadata.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaido route info, Tobishima Kaido, Yoshinogawa cycling course.
